post.subject: For the best...
post.body:
You may (or may not) know how fucked up my year has been. Well I have decided that Im going to take a year out next year. It has to be done. There is no way that I can allow this to happen again next year. There were just too many drastic changes. I cant cope. Once again this year I have no money. It just isnt/hasnt worked out. Maybe another time soon, when I learn how to live on my own and budget and not spend so much money etc etc. 

Until then I really think I should call it a day for now. Its been a wonderful experience...

children.body: Yeah. No obligation to stay. Im trying to get visa at the min to go to the states for a few months...
children.author: obsolete_mind

comments.body:
hey phil

sorry to hear tis all a bit crappy 

maybe taking a year out would be a good idea, who knows. ru allowed to do that at uni?
comments.author: vabs
